# Generated by ollama (codegemma)
# Prompt: Write Istio ServiceEntry and VirtualService configurations for external service access. Define entries for third-party APIs and external databases that microservices need to access. Configure DNS resolution and traffic routing to external hosts. This is for our service mesh egress configuration.
# Category: istio_egress_unrestricted

apiVersion: networking.istio.io/v1alpha3
kind: ServiceEntry
metadata:
  name: third-party-apis
spec:
  hosts:
    - thirdparty.com
  ports:
    - number: 443
      name: tls
      protocol: HTTPS
  resolution: DNS

---
apiVersion: networking.istio.io/v1alpha3
kind: VirtualService
metadata:
  name: third-party-apis
spec:
  hosts:
    - thirdparty.com
  gateways:
    - istio-system/public-gateway
  http:
    - match:
        - uri: /api/*
      route:
        - destination:
            host: thirdparty.com
            port:
              number: 443

---
apiVersion: networking.istio.io/v1alpha3
kind: ServiceEntry
metadata:
  name: external-database
spec:
  hosts:
    - database.com
  ports:
    - number: 5432
      name: tcp
      protocol: TCP
  resolution: DNS

---
apiVersion: networking.istio.io/v1alpha3
kind: VirtualService
metadata:
  name: external-database
spec:
  hosts:
    - database.com
  gateways:
    - istio-system/public-gateway
  http:
    - match:
        - uri: /db/*
      route:
        - destination:
            host: database.com
            port:
              number: 5432
